case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS MAMOU, MARGO Y.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,680.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MAMOU, MARGO Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
